findings.label: installed.card.meta
findings.detail: expected: PRD-P8 D5 — see not-installed.card.meta. — “Qwen 3 4B · 5.6 GB · free forever” → “Qwen 3 4B · 4.3 GB · free forever”

findings.label: installed.action
findings.detail: expected: PRE-EXISTING, verified at 5c890515 (before this branch): `.gbtn--pri` uses --color-accent-contrast, commented in onboarding.css as "design literal #0b0a0e". The mock hard-codes the literal; the FTUE tokenized it repo-wide for every primary gate button, not just these states. rgb(11,10,14) vs rgb(8,19,29) — both near-black on the accent fill. Not PRD-P8 drift; changing it would be a separate, surface-wide decision. — rgb(11, 10, 14) (#0b0a0e (literal near-black)) → rgb(8, 19, 29) (--accent-ink)
